## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential GrowthX engagement with ResourcePro to support content and growth initiatives, particularly for compliance offerings.](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ResourcePro interested in GrowthX support, but seeking lower-risk entry point than full strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
  - [Key opportunities in geographic/state-specific content, timely regulatory updates, and industry verticals](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [GrowthX flexible on engagement structure; can potentially customize strategy sprint and show early value](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
  - [ResourcePro team to discuss internally and aim to provide feedback by mid-next week](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)

## Topics

### Current ResourcePro Marketing Approach

  - [Primarily uses traditional digital marketing: SEO, organic social, Google Ads, LinkedIn, email](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Compliance vertical customers often have urgent needs when searching](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Challenge finding large enough audience for specific compliance-related searches](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Need to drive awareness for cross-sell to existing customer base](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [Typical client lifecycle of 2-3 years before bringing compliance in-house](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Potential GrowthX Support Areas

  - [Geographic/state-specific content (e.g. licensing requirements)](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Timely content on regulatory updates and industry changes](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Industry vertical-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Improving user experience vs. government websites](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Cross-sell enablement content](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Scaling content production with AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

### GrowthX Engagement Structure

  - [Starts with 6-8 week strategy sprint to align on roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
  - [Develops AI-ready artifacts to ensure consistent outputs](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
  - [Moves to daily content publishing execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Flexible on customizing approach and showing early value](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Can potentially publish initial content during strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### ResourcePro Budget/Approval Considerations

  - [Not explicitly budgeted, but leadership interest in piloting](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)
  - [Seeking lower-risk entry point to prove ROI before larger investment](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=2428.0)
  - [Want to understand concrete deliverables/outputs](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [Evaluating automation/AI investments across business](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Chris/Kari to discuss internally with ResourcePro team returning from PTO](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=2691.0)
  - [GrowthX to share additional examples/case studies of similar engagements](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=3035.0)
  - [ResourcePro to provide feedback on potential engagement by mid-next week](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=3051.0)
  - [GrowthX to consider options for customized/lower-risk entry point](https://fathom.video/share/1CFm255VJyDsNzpa4bGhQUCgnhuGn6pu?tab=summary&timestamp=2516.0)
